name: Pistachio Chicken Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the chicken fillets from their breast halves and set aside.
2. Place each breast half on a sheet of plastic wrap and lightly sprinkle with water to prevent sticking.
3. Cover with another sheet of plastic wrap and pound each breast half to about 1/4-inch thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
4. Heat butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, pistachios, and ham; cook and stir until the mushrooms release their moisture and almost evaporates.
5. Remove from heat and mix in breadcrumbs.
6. Season chicken lightly with salt and black pepper.
7. Divide mushroom mixture evenly among the chicken breasts and roll up tightly, securing each with toothpicks.
8. Place rolls seam-side down in a baking pan.
9. In a small saucepan, combine cornstarch and white wine; mix well over low heat until smooth.
10. Add butter, apricot preserves, and chutney to the cornstarch mixture; stir until dissolved and slightly thickened.
11. Pour half of the sauce over the chicken rolls.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, basting occasionally with remaining sauce.
13. Remove toothpicks from rolls.
14. Drizzle remaining sauce over individual servings on plates.
15. Cut each roll into 3/8-inch slices and arrange cut-side up in an overlapping pattern on the plate.
16. Garnish with orange slices and whole pistachios before serving.
